name: pysam
tagline: Reference skill teaching pysam usage to read/write SAM/BAM/CRAM, VCF/BCF and FASTA/FASTQ genomic files via samtools/bcftools wrappers.
verdict: Clean, narrowly-scoped bioinformatics reference. No credential access, no network egress, no piped/remote code execution, no obfuscation, no manipulative language. File-write operations (pysam "wb" mode, samtools.sort/view) are ordinary library semantics, not unconfirmed destructive actions. Only soft gap: no explicit "when NOT to use" guidance.

highlights.summary: No 'when NOT to use this skill' guidance is present anywhere in the file; a user can't easily tell when a different tool (e.g. non-genomic file handling) would be more appropriate.
